warning: This rubric translates the supplied guide, supplied papers, current repo artifacts, and selected public standards into validation criteria. It is not clinician, educator, privacy, accessibility, or institutional approval.

source_references.title: Using Goals in Codex: Persistent Objectives for Long-Running Work
Applications of artificial intelligence in healthcare simulation: a model of thinking
source_references.source: papers/Applications of artificial intelligence in healthcare simulation - a model of thinking.pdf

source_references.title: Clinical Reasoning Curricula in Preclinical Undergraduate Medical Education: A Scoping Review
Improving ED Emergency Severity Index Acuity Assignment Using Machine Learning and Clinical NLP
Large Language Model-Based Virtual Patient Simulations in Medical and Nursing Education: A Review
AAMC Core Entrustable Professional Activities for Entering Residency
ACEP/ENA Emergency Department Triage Joint Policy Statement
Society for Simulation in Healthcare Full Accreditation

criteria.evidence_basis: The goal guide emphasizes measurable outcomes, verification surfaces, constraints, boundaries, iteration policy, and evidence-based completion.
criteria.current_evidence: Readiness report exists at docs/national_scale_readiness_report.json with verdict not_ready.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Keep readiness completion tied to gate evidence rather than narrative progress.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM output in medical simulation must be controlled, transparent, and secondary to reviewed evidence when used for learner feedback.
criteria.current_evidence: Feedback integrity gate is partial; optional AI draft panel present: true.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Maintain tests proving optional AI drafts cannot mutate deterministic scoring, SOAP, or checklist feedback.

criteria.evidence_basis: National-scale simulation cases require adjudicated patient truth, not inferred teaching support.
criteria.current_evidence: 0/23 case truth packets are reviewed; 23 remain pending.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Clinician-adjudicated truth record for every case: diagnosis, differential, consult/referral, stabilization, resources, objective data, reassessment, and disposition.

criteria.evidence_basis: Broad national use needs enough cases for repeat practice, acuity coverage, and subgroup review.
criteria.current_evidence: Public case count is 23; ESI distribution is {"ESI_2":10,"ESI_1":2,"ESI_3":5,"ESI_4":4,"ESI_5":2}.
criteria.required_next_evidence: At least 100 clinician-reviewed public-safe cases with balanced acuity, complaint, demographic, and special-population coverage.

criteria.evidence_basis: The ESI ML paper evaluated acuity against clinician consensus and reported undertriage/overtriage, including the ESI 2 versus 3 boundary.
criteria.current_evidence: The app has source ESI labels and draft packets, but no public benchmark report comparing learners or the simulator against expert consensus.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Gold-standard ESI review set, expert agreement report, learner ESI accuracy, undertriage rate, overtriage rate, and ESI 2/3 boundary analysis.

criteria.evidence_basis: ACEP/ENA support a scientifically validated ED triage scale such as ESI; ENA frames ESI training around decision points, case examples, and post-course assessment.
criteria.current_evidence: The evidence bundle includes ENA ESI sources and the cases include reference ESI values, but case-level ESI rationale has not been fully clinician-reviewed.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Case-by-case ESI decision-point rationales reviewed against the current ENA ESI Handbook and institutional triage education expectations.

criteria.evidence_basis: The clinical reasoning scoping review recommends explicitly defining clinical reasoning in curricular reports.
criteria.current_evidence: Draft outcomes protocol present: true.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Faculty-approved definition of clinical reasoning used consistently in learner-facing curriculum, scoring, and research protocol.

criteria.evidence_basis: Clinical reasoning curriculum reports should identify theory and domains addressed.
criteria.current_evidence: Objective matrix maps 23/23 cases across draft domains.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Educator-reviewed mapping from noticing, interpreting, responding, and reflecting to each debrief and scored action.

criteria.evidence_basis: Assessment validity evidence is a stated weakness in clinical reasoning curricula and must be reported when available.
criteria.current_evidence: Reviewed objective cases: 0; outcome protocol status: draft_protocol_present_not_validated; outcome metrics framework: draft_instrumentation_framework_needs_pilot_validation.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Validity argument covering content validity, response process, internal structure/reliability, relation to other measures, and consequence monitoring.

criteria.evidence_basis: Claims about clinical judgment improvement need standardized, reproducible metrics before pilot or multi-site outcome studies can be interpreted.
criteria.current_evidence: Draft framework defines 20 metrics, including 13 currently instrumented metrics and 4 metrics requiring external validation. Runtime outcome probes passed 7/7; privacy export findings: keys=0, identifiers=0.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Privacy-approved cohort exports, pre/post pilot analysis, delayed retention cases, and external transfer measures.

criteria.evidence_basis: AAMC Core EPAs define entering-residency expectations and recommend mapping educational opportunities and assessments to EPAs.
criteria.current_evidence: Draft Core EPA map present: 11/13 EPAs touched by workflow; 0 reviewed case mappings.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Faculty-approved Core EPA map, intended learner level, supervision assumptions, scoring use, and curriculum placement.

criteria.evidence_basis: AAMC EPA guidance emphasizes longitudinal aggregated performance evidence, multiple assessors, coaching, and formative feedback.
criteria.current_evidence: The app has draft learner progression concepts but no multi-assessor longitudinal implementation or institutional entrustment process.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Learner progression dataset, faculty observation hooks, coaching/remediation workflows, and multi-modal performance review protocol.

criteria.evidence_basis: SSH accreditation separates core program evidence from optional assessment, research, human simulation, teaching/education, systems integration, and fellowship areas.
criteria.current_evidence: The readiness docs include governance and scale plans but no SSH-style program evidence map.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Institution-specific simulation program evidence map for teaching/education, assessment, governance, faculty roles, content ownership, and quality improvement.

criteria.evidence_basis: The AI simulation model distinguishes education, assessment, faculty development, translational simulation, and research/scholarship use cases.
criteria.current_evidence: The readiness goal distinguishes education, assessment, governance, and research needs, but app settings do not yet expose all use-case boundaries or approvals.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Mode-specific policy for practice, assessment, faculty review, translational research, and scholarship workflows.

criteria.evidence_basis: AI in healthcare simulation requires ethics, AI literacy, cybersecurity, and governance foundations.
criteria.current_evidence: Governance inventory status is draft_needs_institutional_privacy_security_review; governance plan present: true.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Institution-approved AI disclosure, learner consent, bias review, API-key policy, cybersecurity review, and incident-response owner.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM virtual patient reviews call for robust data governance and ethical/legal accountability.
criteria.current_evidence: Data inventory status is draft_needs_institutional_privacy_security_review; default public workflow network requests: false.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Approved FERPA/HIPAA-adjacent deployment review, retention policy, DPA/vendor review, and restricted-data prohibition for public cohorts.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM VP systems need factual accuracy checks and expert oversight because hallucination can affect learning.
criteria.current_evidence: Optional LLM patient/tutor paths exist, but there is no automated factual consistency suite across cases.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Case-fact consistency tests for patient voice, tutor, debrief draft, and written critique outputs.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM VP systems require role consistency and patient-state consistency across dynamic dialogue.
criteria.current_evidence: No role-consistency benchmark or scenario drift report is present.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Dialogue regression suite checking patient persona, timeline, symptom boundaries, vitals, and refusal to invent unavailable objective data.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM VP reviews identify emotional realism as a persistent challenge for educational authenticity.
criteria.current_evidence: No emotional realism rubric or student/faculty evaluation data is present.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Standardized patient-style realism rubric, learner survey, and faculty review across common ED scenarios.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM VP systems need transparent reporting of model versions, prompts, knowledge sources, and evaluation methods.
criteria.current_evidence: Draft augmentation metadata and evidence bundle versions exist; optional AI session reporting is not yet complete across all workflows.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Per-session model/provider/prompt/source-bundle/version metadata surfaced to instructors and exportable for review.

criteria.evidence_basis: LLM VP reviews call for stronger multi-site controlled studies and standardized metrics before generalizable claims.
criteria.current_evidence: Outcome protocol present: true; outcome framework present: true; reviewed outcome studies: 0; status remains draft_protocol_present_not_validated.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Pilot and multi-site controlled evaluation measuring ESI accuracy, undertriage reduction, rationale quality, OSCE/simulation transfer, and hospital-performance proxies.

criteria.evidence_basis: The LLM VP review highlights standardized metrics for reproducible evaluation.
criteria.current_evidence: Educational outcome metrics are instrumented, but no full VP quality suite is implemented for factuality, role consistency, realism, latency, learner satisfaction, and learning impact.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Metric definitions, evaluator rubrics, automated probes, and threshold reports per release.

criteria.evidence_basis: Open-evidence-first feedback requires clinical teaching claims to be auditable and traceable.
criteria.current_evidence: 89/2489 chunks are quote-backed; 2400 generated chunks need review; runtime policy probes passed: true.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Replace or approve generated summaries with quote-backed or clinician-approved chunks before source-of-truth learner feedback.

criteria.evidence_basis: Generated evidence needs a human review workflow before it can become authoritative clinical feedback.
criteria.current_evidence: Evidence backlog has 944 batches and 2400 pending chunks; runtime quarantine returned 0 generated references in policy probes.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Reviewer assignments, completed reviews, promotion/removal decisions, and regenerated source-quality report showing no unresolved generated-needs-review chunks in learner-facing content.

criteria.evidence_basis: A citation is not enough; the cited source must support the exact clinical claim and its context.
criteria.current_evidence: The project has citation contracts and source IDs, but no public claim-entailment audit across deterministic feedback categories.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Claim-level entailment review for diagnosis, ESI, management, consult/referral, reassessment, disposition, and safety advice.

criteria.evidence_basis: Simulation education and assessment require human review of clinical truth and teaching objectives.
criteria.current_evidence: Case truth review queue exists with 23 packets and 2 minimum reviewers per case.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Completed clinician and educator review packets, disagreement adjudication, and reviewer identity/role audit trail.

criteria.evidence_basis: AI hallucinations, unsafe simplifications, and bias in educational simulation can harm learning outcomes.
criteria.current_evidence: Draft safety suite present with 10 tests across 10/10 required categories; runtime passed 10.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Run automated probes and complete clinician/educator review for high-risk ED presentations, bias, unsafe disposition, and misleading reassurance.

criteria.evidence_basis: National clinical education tools must avoid demographic stereotyping, preserve language access and accommodation needs, and review whether feedback teaches equitable clinical reasoning.
criteria.current_evidence: Draft equity audit queues 23 cases, has 0 reviewed cases, and passed 8/8 automated bias probes.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Case-level equity notes, language-access review, disability/accommodation review, pregnancy/reproductive-health review where relevant, and clinician-educator approval of bias safeguards.

criteria.evidence_basis: National curricular deployment must be accessible and usable across learners and institutions.
criteria.current_evidence: Scale/accessibility plan present: true; WCAG audit status: automated_static_audit_complete_manual_wcag_required.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Completed WCAG audit, keyboard and screen-reader test pass, accommodation plan, and learner usability study.

criteria.evidence_basis: Multi-institution use needs operational reliability, monitoring, and reproducible release controls.
criteria.current_evidence: Load-test status: runtime_scale_smoke_passed_load_monitoring_required; monitoring status: draft_plan_present_not_operational.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Load test, uptime/error budget, monitoring dashboard, incident drill, content rollback plan, and release checklist.

criteria.evidence_basis: National simulation deployment needs named accountability for content ownership, updates, incidents, and learner-facing claims.
criteria.current_evidence: Governance plan present: true; institutional review ready: false.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Signed institutional clinical content governance SOP, source update cadence, case retirement process, and incident escalation/rollback plan.

criteria.evidence_basis: A readiness process is only trustworthy if draft review queues do not pass readiness gates.
criteria.current_evidence: Verdict is not_ready; case truth gate is fail; evidence gate is fail.
criteria.required_next_evidence: Keep the gate fail conditions strict until real clinical review and evidence review are complete.
